sentences.target: Tu regardes l'élection à la télé ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁəɡaʁd lelɛksjɔ̃ a la tele sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu regardes l'élection à la télé ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁəɡaʁd lelɛksjɔ̃ a la tele sə swaʁ/
translations.en: You’re watching the election on TV tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche vas a ver las elecciones en la tele.
translations.de: Du schaust dir heute Abend die Wahl im Fernsehen an.
translations.it: Stasera guardi le elezioni in TV.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 TV에서 선거를 볼 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今晚会在电视上看大选。
translations.yue: 你今晚會喺電視睇選舉。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером ты будешь смотреть выборы по телевизору.
translations.pt: Você vai assistir à eleição na TV hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn sẽ xem bầu cử trên TV.
translations.ar: أنت تشاهد الانتخابات على التلفاز الليلة.
translations.nl: Vanavond kijk je naar de verkiezingen op tv.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ти дивишся вибори по телевізору.
translations.hu: Ma este a tévében nézed a választást.
translations.hi: आज रात तुम टीवी पर चुनाव देखोगे.
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem oglądasz wybory w telewizji.
translations.el: Απόψε βλέπεις τις εκλογές στην τηλεόραση.
translations.nb: I kveld ser du valget på TV.
translations.id: Malam ini kamu menonton pemilu di TV.
translations.sv: I kväll tittar du på valet på tv.
translations.ro: Diseară te uiți la alegeri la televizor.
translations.cs: Dnes večer se díváš na volby v televizi.
translations.da: I aften ser du valget på tv.
translations.ja: 今夜はテレビで選挙を見る。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; functions as the grammatical subject of the verb 'regardes'.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with 'Tu' and takes the direct object 'l'élection'.
Definite article elided before a vowel; feminine singular here, determiners the noun 'élection' and marks definiteness.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'regardes'.
Preposition introducing the locative prepositional phrase 'à la télé'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'télé'.
Common noun (colloquial for 'télévision'), feminine; object of the preposition 'à'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' to form the temporal NP 'ce soir' (this evening).
Common noun, masculine; head of 'ce soir', functioning as a time adjunct.

sentences.target: On parle de l'élection au café.

translations.fr: On parle de l'élection au café.
translations.en: We’re talking about the election at the café.
translations.es: Estamos hablando de las elecciones en el café.
translations.de: Wir reden im Café über die Wahl.
translations.ko: 우리는 카페에서 선거에 대해 이야기하고 있어.
translations.yue: 我哋喺咖啡店度傾選舉。
translations.pt: Estamos conversando sobre a eleição no café.
translations.he: אנחנו מדברים על הבחירות בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nói về cuộc bầu cử ở quán cà phê.
translations.ar: نحن نتحدث عن الانتخابات في المقهى.
translations.nl: We praten in het café over de verkiezingen.
translations.uk: Ми говоримо про вибори в кав’ярні.
translations.hi: हम कैफ़े में चुनाव के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μιλάμε για τις εκλογές στο καφέ.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om valget på kafé.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om valet på kaféet.
translations.da: Vi taler om valget på caféen.
translations.ja: 私たちはカフェで選挙について話している。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement; subject of 'parle'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; used with 'de' to mean 'talk about'.
Preposition introducing the complement 'l'élection'.
Definite article elided before a vowel; feminine singular, determiner of 'élection'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'de'.
Contraction of preposition 'à' + definite article 'le'; introduces the locative PP 'au café' (masculine singular).
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'au'.

translations.en: I’m waiting for the election results.
translations.es: Estoy esperando los resultados de las elecciones.
translations.it: Sto aspettando i risultati delle elezioni.
translations.pt: Estou esperando os resultados da eleição.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chờ kết quả bầu cử.
translations.nl: Ik wacht op de uitslag van de verkiezingen.
translations.hi: मैं चुनाव के परिणामों का इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: 選挙結果を待っている。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject clitic; elided before vowel-initial 'attends'; subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; takes 'les résultats' as direct object.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'résultats' marking definiteness.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'attends'.
Preposition introducing the noun complement 'l'élection' specifying which results.
Definite article elided before a vowel; feminine singular, determiner of 'élection'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Ils vont organiser une élection à l'école.
sentences.reading: /il vɔ̃ ɔʁɡanize yn elɛksjɔ̃ a lekɔl/

translations.fr: Ils vont organiser une élection à l'école.
translations.ipa: /il vɔ̃ ɔʁɡanize yn elɛksjɔ̃ a lekɔl/
translations.en: They’re going to organize an election at school.
translations.es: Van a organizar una elección en la escuela.
translations.de: Sie werden in der Schule eine Wahl organisieren.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们打算在学校举办一次选举。
translations.yue: 佢哋會喺學校舉辦一次選舉。
translations.ru: Они собираются организовать выборы в школе.
translations.pt: Eles vão organizar uma eleição na escola.
translations.he: הם עומדים לארגן בחירות בבית הספר.
translations.vi: Họ sẽ tổ chức một cuộc bầu cử ở trường.
translations.nl: Ze gaan op school een verkiezing organiseren.
translations.uk: Вони збираються організувати вибори в школі.
translations.hi: वे स्कूल में एक चुनाव आयोजित करने वाले हैं.
translations.nb: De skal organisere et valg på skolen.
translations.id: Mereka akan menyelenggarakan pemilihan di sekolah.
translations.sv: De ska ordna ett val i skolan.
translations.da: De vil organisere et valg på skolen.
translations.ja: 彼らは学校で選挙を実施する予定だ。

tokens.explanation: Third-person plural subject pronoun (masculine or mixed); subject of 'vont'.
Auxiliary 'aller' in present indicative, 3rd person plural; forms near-future with the infinitive 'organiser'.
Main verb in infinitive; complement of the auxiliary 'vont'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'élection'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'organiser'.
Preposition introducing the locative PP 'à l'école'.
Definite article elided before a vowel; feminine singular determiner of 'école'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'à'.
